content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the e2e fixture implementation (src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs, src/test_support/br.rs dispatch extension, src/test_support/mod.rs registration). All acceptance criteria are met: fixture builds a complete workspace with Ready milestone, plan.md/plan.json artifacts, 3-bead graph with mixed ParentChild/Blocks dependencies, pre-configured MockBrAdapter (with stateful follow-up create/close) and MockBvAdapter responses. The smoke test comprehensively verifies the fixture (1065 lib tests pass). cargo fmt --check passes. Clippy has 27 pre-existing errors in files unrelated to this change (same count on master). No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found. Mock dispatch locking is sound (no deadlock, no held locks across await), JSON shapes match the consumer deserializers (BeadSummary, BeadDetail, NextBeadResponse), and dependency kinds are emitted correctly. No amendments proposed.

## Amendments

None.
